horizon-heights.usp: Rooftop infinity pool, sky lounge, EV charging on every floor
horizon-heights.architecture_description: Sleek glass-and-steel tower with a curved facade, vertical garden strips on alternating floors, grand double-height entrance lobby with water feature
amenities: Landscaped central garden with jogging track

logo_primary.description: Primary Horizon Heights logo lockup on transparent background

main_building_exterior.description: Front elevation render of the 32-story tower at twilight, glass facade lit up, entrance lobby visible

aerial_view.description: Drone shot from 200m showing the tower, surrounding landscaping, and nearby tech park

construction_progress.description: Site photo showing 18 completed floors, crane on top, blue safety nets, workers visible on upper deck

entrance_gate.description: Grand double-height entrance lobby with water feature and landscaped driveway

swimming_pool.description: Rooftop infinity pool render with city skyline in background, sun loungers, potted palms, dusk lighting

sky_lounge.description: 32nd floor sky lounge interior with floor-to-ceiling windows, city panorama, warm pendant lighting, leather seating

gymnasium.description: Modern gym interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the garden

sample_flat_living_room.description: Spacious living room with large windows, modern furniture, warm lighting, city view

sales_gallery.description: Sales gallery interior with scale model of the tower, reception desk, brochure display

horizon-greens.usp: 35 acres of green township with 70% open space, pet-friendly zones, organic community farm
horizon-greens.architecture_description: Cluster of eight pastel-toned mid-rise towers arranged around a massive central park, each tower with a distinct earthy color accent, wide tree-lined internal roads
amenities: Senior citizen garden with reflexology path

logo_primary.description: Primary Horizon Greens logo lockup on transparent background

main_building_exterior.description: Front elevation of Tower A, pastel terracotta tone, balconies with planters, ground-floor retail visible

aerial_view.description: Drone shot of the full 35-acre township, all 8 towers visible, central park in the middle, tree-lined roads

township_overview.description: Wide-angle ground-level view of the township entrance with multiple towers in background, landscaped boulevard

entrance_gate.description: Grand township entrance gate with security booth, wide road, avenue trees, welcome signage

swimming_pool.description: Olympic-size swimming pool with lane markers, poolside cabanas, clubhouse building in background

clubhouse.description: Two-story clubhouse exterior with glass facade, banquet hall visible on upper floor, landscaped forecourt

garden_jogging_track.description: 1.2 km cycling and jogging loop winding through landscaped gardens with distance markers

yoga_pavilion.description: Open-air yoga pavilion with wooden deck, surrounded by bamboo groves, morning mist, calm meditative atmosphere

organic_farm.description: Community organic farm with raised beds, families gardening, small greenhouse in corner

pet_park.description: Fenced pet park with agility course obstacles, dogs playing, owners on benches

sample_flat_living_room.description: Open-plan living and dining area with balcony overlooking the central park, earthy tones

sample_flat_bedroom.description: Compact master bedroom with built-in wardrobe, large window with garden view

sample_flat_kitchen.description: Modular kitchen with breakfast counter, pastel cabinetry, window above sink

sales_gallery.description: Sales gallery with large township scale model, interactive screens, lounge seating
